informationWeCollectText: We collect information you provide directly to us, including:
info1: Name, email address, phone number, and postal address
info2: Date of birth and nationality for identity verification
info4: Financial information (bank account details, trading history)
howWeUseText: We use the information we collect to:
use1: Process your account application and verify your identity
use2: Provide and maintain our trading services
use3: Process deposits, withdrawals, and fund transfers
use4: Send you important updates and notifications
use5: Comply with legal and regulatory obligations
use6: Improve our services and customer support
sharingText: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your information with:
share2: Regulatory authorities as required by law
securityText: We implement industry-standard security measures including 256-bit SSL encryption, secure data centers, regular security audits, and strict access controls to protect your personal information.
cookiesText: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze site traffic, and personalize content. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings.
rightsText: Under GDPR and other regulations, you have the right to:
right4: Object to processing of your data
contactText: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your rights, please contact us at privacy@dolmarkets.com.
